moment.reason: Large bundle size, mutable API, in maintenance mode

lodash.reason: Large bundle when imported entirely; most utilities are native now

underscore.reason: Superseded by lodash and native methods

chalk.reason: Lighter alternatives exist if bundle size matters

axios.reason: Large bundle; native fetch + lightweight wrappers are sufficient

rimraf.reason: fs.rm({ recursive: true }) is built-in since Node 14

mkdirp.reason: fs.mkdir({ recursive: true }) is built-in since Node 10

colors.reason: Unmaintained and had a supply chain attack in 2022

q.reason: Native Promises replaced Q years ago

bluebird.reason: Native Promises are fast enough; V8 optimizations closed the gap

async.reason: async/await and Promise.all() cover most use cases natively
